subcategory: AI conversational chat interface with animated gradient background
use_cases: AI assistant chat widget for SaaS applications
Conversational user input interface for customer support
Interactive demo component for AI-powered tools
Real-time chat UI with simulated AI responses
Dark-themed chat card for modern web applications
ai_summary: An AI chat card component featuring a dark theme with animated rotating border and gradient background effects. Includes message history display, text input field, and simulated AI typing indicator with response delay. The interface uses glass morphism styling with backdrop blur and floating particle animations for a modern, immersive feel. Designed as a self-contained conversational UI element suitable for embedding in SaaS platforms, developer tools, or AI assistant interfaces.
